name: Path of Exile
description: Build analysis and modification via headless Path of Building — paste a build link or iterate on existing builds
limitations: Build analysis only — no live character data yet (GGG API access pending)
Timeless jewel calculations are not supported

pob_calc.name: PoB Build Calculator
pob_calc.description: Analyze or modify a Path of Exile build via Path of Building. Pass a build URL to analyze it, or a buildId with operations to modify an existing build. Every response includes a buildId for follow-up modifications.

build.description: URL to a PoB build (pobb.in, pastebin, pob.savecraft.gg link). Required on first call. Omit when modifying by buildId.

build_id.description: Build ID from a previous pob_calc response. Use to modify or re-analyze without a URL.

operations.description: JSON array of modifications. Omit for analysis. Ops: set_level, swap_gem, add_gem, remove_gem, toggle_keystone, allocate_node, deallocate_node, equip_unique, set_item. See query_reference parameter docs for full syntax.
